dialogue_text: City life does not agree with me at all,
source_excerpt: "City life does not agree with me at all," remarked the Lion, as they walked along at a brisk pace. "I have lost much flesh since I lived there, and now I am anxious for a chance to show the other beasts how courageous I have grown."

dialogue_text: Oz was not such a bad Wizard, after all,
source_excerpt: "Oz was not such a bad Wizard, after all," said the Tin Woodman, as he felt his heart rattling around in his breast.

dialogue_text: He knew how to give me brains, and very good brains, too,
source_excerpt: "He knew how to give me brains, and very good brains, too," said the Scarecrow.
